subject: My Black Friday Gift
body:
Here's my Black Friday gift to you.

Last year, I gave this because I didn't want to give you an offer.

I just wanted to give you value.

This year, I'm doing the exact same thing because it's still really valuable.

It's the $100M Scaling Roadmap.

Personalized. $0 to $100M+ broken into 10 stages across 8 functions.

Takes 30 seconds.

Tells you exactly what to work on at your stage.

A quarter million business owners have gone through it since.

If you're one of them - go through it again.

You're at a different stage now.

Different problems.

Different constraints.

If you haven't seen it, it's the best thing I can give you.

It's for higher level businesses, though.

If you're on the smaller side, it'll still help.

The best deal of all is free.

Alex
